html:
Exclusive to:

The Thunderhat is a craftable Dress Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires 1 Thunder Feather, 1 Gold Nuggets, and 2 Cork to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Thunderhat prevents the player from being shocked by lightning from Thunderbirds, weather, destroying pseudo science station or other sources of lightning strikes. Each lightning strike reduces the durability by 5% and Thunderbirds typically cause three bolts of lightning.

Trivia

  • The Thunderhat appears to be modeled after Pickelhaube-style helmets common to European militaries in the 18th and 19th centuries.

Gallery

  • Wilba wearing a Thunderhat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Thunderhat.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"thunderhat"
“Does this hat make me look scientific?”
–Wilson
“This looks good on me.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang look good in hat.”
–Wolfgang
“Pretty.”
–Wendy
“I WILL BRING THE THUNDER NOW.”
–WX-78
“I'm not usually one for hats.”
–Wickerbottom
“How do I look?”
–Woodie
“Electrifying finery.”
–Maxwell
“A lightning rod mere inches from my brain. What an intriguing experiment!”
–Wagstaff
“Tis a hat worthy of Thor.”
–Wigfrid
“Check out our hat!”
–Webber
“Love the hat.”
–Walani
“Not a chef hat but good for a night out.”
–Warly
“Not me piratin' 'at, but I'll take it.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA READY FOR ADVENTURE.”
–Wilba
“Pointy Head Thing”
–Wormwood
“Won't ground me in a storm.”
–Wheeler
The Thunderhat is a craftable Dress Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires 1 Thunder Feather, 1 Gold Nuggets, and 2 Cork to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Thunderhat prevents the player from being shocked by lightning from Thunderbirds, weather, destroying pseudo science station or other sources of lightning strikes. Each lightning strike reduces the durability by 5% and Thunderbirds typically cause three bolts of lightning.

The Thunderhat appears to be modeled after Pickelhaube-style helmets common to European militaries in the 18th and 19th centuries.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Sấm Sét là một Trang phục chế tạo được dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Trang Phục, yêu cầu 1 Lông Sấm, 1 Vàng Thỏi và 2 Nút Chai để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu.
